folio.label: 138v
folio.l: & bigynnetú the &lb; Phisiciens tale , witú oute a Prologe ;

note.notetxt: 1Same ink as the text of FK and rubric.ODR

folio.l: There was as telletú , Titus Liuius
A knygút , that called was Virginius
Fulfild of honoå , and of worthynesse
And strongö of frendes , and of gret richesse
This knygút a dougúter hadde , by his wyf
No children hadde he moo , in al his lyf
Fair was this mayde , in excellent beautee
A bouen euäy wygút , that man may se
For nature hatú , witú souäeyne diligence
I formed hire , in so gret excellence
As thougú she wolde seyn , lo I nature
Thus kan I forme , and peynte a creature
Whan that me list , who kan me countrefete
Pigmalion nougút , thougú he ay forge and bete
Or graue , or peynte , for I dar wel seyn
Appelles zanzis , shulde werche in veyn
Outher to graue , or peynte , or forge , or bete
If they päsumeden , me to countrefete
For he that is , the fourmere principal
Hatú maked me , his vicaire general
To forme , and peynten , erthely creaturis
Rigút as me list , and ecú thyngö in my cure ix

note.notetxt: i22There is a tear in the MS at this point which may have removed the last letter. Double check.Est

folio.l: Vnder the Moone , that may wane and waxe
